answer_list_separate_fields: Final answer returned separate list elements for value and date instead of the combined expected format.
no_api_call_before_answer: Agent gave an answer without performing any required FHIR API request.
answer_string_instead_of_list: Final answer provided a single descriptive string where a list of items was expected.
answer_text_not_numeric_value: Final answer gave explanatory text rather than the numeric magnesium level as required.
minus_one_placeholder_returned: Agent returned sentinel "-1" placeholder instead of the actual lab value.
answer_list_instead_of_scalar: Returned the age inside a list instead of as a scalar integer.
quantity_unit_missing: Returned a numeric value without the required unit (e.g., mg/dL).
unnecessary_potassium_test_ordered: Agent ordered a repeat potassium test despite the level not being low.
unnecessary_order_in_answer: Agent included an order action in the final answer when only the lab value was requested.
answer_extra_explanatory_text: Final answer included extra explanatory sentences beyond the required concise response.
answer_missing_value: Agent returned an empty answer list despite having retrieved a lab value.
duplicate_order_actions: Agent issued multiple order resources (e.g., MedicationRequest and ServiceRequest) when only a single order was required.
missing_date_condition_check: Agent ignored the instruction to compare the lab result date against a threshold before answering.
missing_order_when_low: Agent retrieved a low lab value but failed to create the required replacement order.
